name: Maryam Al-Qaisi
whatsapp_message: مرحباً مريم! 👋 لاحظنا أن درجتك في الاختبار الأخير 65، وعندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم - هذا وقت رائع لنساعدك تحسّني درجاتك! 💪 هل تحتاجي لشرح أي مواضيع صعبة؟
action: Contact Maryam today via WhatsApp to introduce yourself, congratulate her on perfect attendance, and schedule a 20-minute review session before the next quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Maryam has never been contacted despite high risk and a below-passing quiz score (65/100). Her perfect attendance shows commitment, making her highly responsive to early intervention. The 6-day window before the next quiz is critical to prevent further score decline.
